series_metadata.series_description: Monthly, semi-annual and annual ER form filings; electric fuel component case files, including: annual summary reports, 30-day filings, M/P audit reports, financial audit reports, company and intervener testimonies, Opinion and Orders, monthly FERC form filings. File also includes additional fuel-related information as needed.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office , storage facility 5 years
